summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Labs/Articles feature - All 19 backend API tests passed (100%), all frontend features working correctly including Labs page, article detail, category filtering, search, admin dashboard Articles tab with rich text editor (react-quill).
passed_tests: GET /api/articles returns all 4 seeded articles with title, summary, content (HTML), category, tags, author_name
GET /api/articles?category=Devices returns only Devices articles (1 article)
GET /api/articles?category=Machines returns only Machines articles (1 article)
GET /api/articles?category=Personas returns only Personas articles (1 article)
GET /api/articles?category=Techniques returns only Techniques articles (1 article)
GET /api/articles returns only published articles by default
GET /api/articles?published_only=false returns all articles including drafts
GET /api/articles/{article_id} returns a single article with all fields
GET /api/articles/{invalid_id} returns 404
Article content field contains HTML (h2, p tags)
POST /api/articles without auth returns 401
POST /api/articles creates a new article (admin auth required) - verified with GET
PUT /api/articles/{id} without auth returns 401
PUT /api/articles/{id} updates an article - verified persistence with GET
DELETE /api/articles/{id} without auth returns 401
DELETE /api/articles/{id} deletes an article - verified with 404 on GET
DELETE /api/articles/{invalid_id} returns 404
Seeded articles have rich HTML content
Seeded articles cover all 4 categories (Devices, Machines, Personas, Techniques)
Labs page (/labs) loads with title, description, category filters, search input
Labs page shows 4 article cards in grid layout
Category filter 'Devices' shows only 1 Devices article
Category filter 'Machines' shows only 1 Machines article
Category filter 'All' shows all 4 articles
Search 'V60' filters to 1 article
Search 'James' (author) filters to 2 articles
Clicking article card navigates to /labs/{articleId}
Article detail page shows title, summary, author info, category badge, date
Article detail page renders rich HTML content with proper typography (h2 headings, paragraphs)
Article detail page shows tags section
Article detail page has 'Back to Labs' link that works
Navbar has 'Labs' link with FlaskConical icon that navigates to /labs
Footer has 'Labs' link in Explore section
Admin dashboard has 'Articles' tab visible
Admin Articles tab shows list of articles with title, category, published status, author, date
Admin Articles tab has 'New Article' button
Admin article list has Edit and Delete buttons on each article
Admin 'New Article' form has all fields: Title, Category select, Summary, Content (Quill editor), Author Name, Tags, Author Bio, Published toggle
Quill rich text editor renders with toolbar (headers, bold, italic, underline, strike, blockquote, lists, link, image, clean)
Admin Edit article form pre-fills all fields including Quill editor content
Cover image upload button present on article list items
seed_data_creation: 4 seeded articles covering Devices, Machines, Personas, Techniques categories with rich HTML content
context_for_next_testing_agent: Labs/Articles feature fully implemented and tested. Backend has CRUD endpoints for articles with admin auth. Frontend has LabsPage with filtering/search, ArticleDetail with rich HTML rendering, and AdminDashboard Articles tab with react-quill-new rich text editor. All 4 seeded articles have proper HTML content generated from sections.
